footer.tagline: Democratizing access to justice for every Indian citizen through multimodal AI and multilingual support.
footer.copyright: © 2026 nyAI Technologies. All rights reserved. Made with ❤️ for Bharat.
footer.legalInfo: nyAI provides general legal information, not legal advice.

sos.chargesWarning: Calling a lawyer may incur charges depending on your plan.

landing.heroDesc: Your AI-powered legal companion — democratizing knowledge, unlocking rights, and bridging the language gap in justice.
landing.problemDesc: Access to justice is a fundamental right. nyAI ensures every citizen can navigate the legal landscape without fear or massive debt.
landing.lackLiteracyDesc: of Indians are unaware of their basic consumer rights and common legal processes.
landing.costBarrierDesc: Average lawyer fees can be unaffordable for handling small, day-to-day legal issues.
landing.langBarrierDesc: Official languages but one legal system primarily in English/Hindi, causing misunderstanding.
landing.featuresDesc: From simple questions to complex document analysis, we've built a suite of tools for the modern citizen.
landing.featChatbotDesc: Ask anything about Indian law, rights, or the constitution in your own language. Get instant clarity with citations.
landing.featGlossaryDesc: Decode complex legal jargon into plain, everyday English. Never be confused by 'legalese' again.
landing.featSOSDesc: Connect to a verified lawyer instantly in crisis situations. One click away from expert legal help.
landing.featDocAnalyzerDesc: Upload any contract or legal notice. AI highlights risky clauses and hidden terms in seconds.
landing.featDocGenDesc: Create rental agreements, rental notices, wills, and contracts automatically based on your state laws.
landing.featPredictorDesc: AI analyzes past case data from Indian courts to predict potential outcomes for your legal dispute.
landing.comingSoon: Coming Soon: Fake Document Detector & National Database Integration
landing.lawyerDesc: Like Astrotalk, but for justice. Verified advocates ready to help you at a moment's notice.
landing.testimonialText: nyAI helped me understand my rental agreement in 2 minutes. My landlord was trying to hide an unfair eviction clause, and the AI caught it immediately. Saved me so much stress!
landing.faq1q: Is nyAI a replacement for a real lawyer?
landing.faq1a: No. nyAI is an informational tool built to provide legal education and document support. For representation in court or specific legal advice, always consult a verified advocate.
landing.faq2a: nyAI supports over 50+ languages including Hindi, Tamil, Telugu, Marathi, Bengali, and even local dialects via mBart-50 integration.
landing.faq3q: How is my data kept private and secure?
landing.faq3a: We use enterprise-grade encryption. Your case documents are never used for training our models unless you explicitly opt into our research program.
landing.faq4q: Can I use nyAI for court submissions?
landing.faq4a: The documents generated are high-quality drafts. However, we recommend having them vetted by a lawyer through our marketplace before actual submission.
landing.faq5q: How does the lawyer connect work?
landing.faq5a: It works like a direct marketplace. Connect with verified lawyers vetted by our team for instant legal consultation.

assistant.title: Legal Assistant
assistant.subtitle: Powered by Groq • llama-3.3-70b
assistant.greeting: नमस्ते! I'm your nyAI legal assistant powered by AI. How can I help you navigate Indian law today?
assistant.inputPlaceholder: Ask about rental laws, FIRs, or legal rights...
assistant.suggestion1: What are my tenant rights in Delhi?
assistant.suggestion3: How to file a consumer court case?
assistant.suggestion4: Need a legal notice for non-payment
assistant.disclaimer: Powered by Groq LLM • Responses are AI-generated and not legal advice.
assistant.errorMsg: I'm sorry, I'm having trouble connecting right now. Please check that the backend server is running and try again.

analyzer.title: Document Analyzer
analyzer.subtitle: Upload contracts to spot risks instantly
analyzer.supports: Supports PDF, DOCX, TXT — up to 10MB

generator.title: Document Generator
generator.subtitle: Powered by Indian law templates
generator.readyDesc: This draft is AI-generated based on your details. Review before use.

predictor.title: Case Predictor
predictor.subtitle: Based on 10,000+ Indian court judgements
predictor.placeholder: Describe your case briefly... (e.g. My employer terminated me without giving the 3-month notice promised in my contract.)
predictor.disclaimerText: Disclaimer: Prediction is based on historical data patterns and is not a guarantee of legal outcome.

detector.title: Fake Doc Detector
detector.subtitle: AI-powered forensic authenticity analysis
detector.pasteLabel: Paste Extracted Text or Describe Document Details
